title: Nouns Cola operating board
dek: Formulation, fundraising, production, profit, and surplus yield for a PointCast pilot.
body:
Nouns Cola now has a PointCast operating page. It is not just a splash page: the board lays out the Formula 01 targets, the fundraising uses, the co-packer production sequence, and a live profit/yield calculator for the pilot run.

The useful move is visibility. If the can works, everyone can see the assumptions before the pallet ships: cases, direct sell-through, wholesale price, production cost, fixed launch spend, raise gap, profit, and the surplus pool.

Yield here means operating surplus routing, not an investment promise: refill production, fund the PointCast treasury, grow the drop, and bonus the team. Go team.
